title: Business English
description: Obchodní angličtina — emaily, schůzky a prezentace.

vocabulary.en: To whom it may concern,
I am writing to enquire about...
I am writing with reference to...
Further to your email,...
Shall we get started?
Let's move on to the next point.
Could I just come in here?
To sum up,...
Can we table that for now?
I'd like to raise a point.
That's outside the scope of today's meeting.
vocabulary.cz: To je nad rámec dnešní schůzky.

vocabulary.en: Let's take a vote on this.
We'll circulate the minutes.
Let's schedule a follow-up.
That's not quite what we had in mind.
vocabulary.cz: To není úplně to, co jsme měli na mysli.

vocabulary.en: We could meet you halfway.
That's a fair point.
Could you be more flexible on...?
vocabulary.cz: Mohli byste být pružnější, pokud jde o ...?

vocabulary.en: Let me check with my team.
I think we can work with that.
vocabulary.cz: Myslím, že s tím pracovat lze.

vocabulary.en: We need to see a better offer.
It's a deal.

tasks: 1. Write a complete formal email requesting a meeting (8–10 lines)
2. Write a complaint email about a delayed delivery
3. Prepare a 3-minute presentation outline on a topic you know well
